name: GT-cauchy-schwarz
source: HOS (Hanche-Olsen & Stormer, Jordan Operator Algebras), refs/hos/joa-m.md:2631-2635 (3.6.2 Lemma), VERBATIM: "Let A be a JB algebra and $\rho$ a state on A. Then if $a, b \in A$ we have (i) $\rho(a \circ b)^2 \le \rho(a^2)\rho(b^2)$, (ii) $\rho(a)^2 \leq \rho(a^2)$. In particular, the map $a \to \rho(a^2)^{1/2}$ is a seminorm on A."
